I Am a Young Person
I Am a Professional
We Are an Organisation

How did AFBE support us?

"We've formalized our partnership with the Association For Black and Minority Ethnic Engineers-UK (AFBE-UK) to enhance Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion (EDI) in engineering and technology. AFBE-UK will guide our EDI strategy, recruitment, and leadership development. This collaboration aims for better representation and support in the engineering community."

Laura Norton-IET

How did AFBE support us?

"AFBE has provided me with valuable insights, knowledge, and skills through their workshops and conferences. They have also introduced me to a supportive community of like-minded individuals."

Elijah, 17

How did AFBE support us?

"Engineers are the midwives of sustainability. None of the UNs SDGs can be achieved without us. It is therefore necessary that participation in Engineer is widened to as broad a group of people as possible."

Dr Ollie Folayan MBE

How did AFBE support us?

" We believe inclusion is the bedrock for creativity and innovation. We promote initiatives that nuture excellence for a sustainable engineering future."

Dr Nike Folayan MBE

Did you know?

Since inception, AFBE has had over 20,000 beneficiaries join the organisation

20,000

Did you know?

Over 80 organisations work with us

80

Did you know?

300 AFBE mentors work with young professionals yearly to achieve their professional goals

300

Did you know?

AFBE organizes over 100 events a year reaching an average of 5,000 attendees on engineering, education, diversity and belonging

5,000

Did you know?

41% of AFBE members are female.

41%

Jobs?

View the latest STEM job vacancies from employers with a positive approach to recruiting a diverse workforce.

AFBE highlights

Our Safeguarding Policy

At AFBE-UK, we are committed to creating a safe, supportive, and protective environment for all children, young people, and vulnerable adults who engage with our programmes. Our Safeguarding Policy outlines the standards, procedures, and responsibilities we uphold to ensure that everyone involved in our activities is protected from harm.

It sets out how we prevent, identify, and respond to safeguarding concerns and reflects our organisational commitment to safety, accountability, and good practice across all AFBE-UK programmes.

DOWNLOAD OUR POLICY
